title: Docherty, Leo - Minister of State for the Armed Forces at the Ministry of Defence -  ACOBA Advice
body: "Mr Docherty left his role at the Ministry of Defence in July 2024.  Advisor, Palantir Technologies UK Ltd Mr Docherty sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Palantir. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Advisor, International Hospitals Group Limited Mr Docherty sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the International Hospitals Group. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2024; and the appointment was taken up in October 2024. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
